backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the PROXIIS backend with task management, user profiles, performance stats, and authorization/storage mixins; exposes CRUD operations for tasks, profiles, leaderboard, and search.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities and key behaviors across views, hooks, and components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PROXIIS Vite app, loading Google Identity Services, QRCode.js, and the React main module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level view routing between LandingView, HubView, and ProfileView, with a neon grid background and a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AuthPromptDialog: Modal dialog prompting unauthenticated users to log in via Internet Identity, with context-specific messaging for viewing tasks or posting tasks.
frontend/src/components/CategorySelector: Horizontally scrollable pill-button category filter that toggles selection and supports an 'All' option to clear the filter.
frontend/src/components/CompleteTaskModa: Modal allowing performers to upload a completion photo and creators to verify and rate a completed task with a star rating.
frontend/src/components/CreateProfilePro: Dialog component that prompts authenticated users without a profile to create one before accessing gated features.
frontend/src/components/DashboardStatsPa: Displays a 2x2 grid of stat cards (tasks completed, user rating, total ratings, tasks posted) fetched from the caller's profile, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: Renders a horizontally scrollable filter bar with toggle buttons for 'Newest', 'Most Urgent', and 'Highest Paying' task filters.
frontend/src/components/HubTopBar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar for the hub view featuring the app title, an expandable search input, a notifications popover, a leaderboard sheet, and a profile button.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardPanel: Fetches and displays the top 10 users on a leaderboard, showing their rank, earnings, tasks completed, and average rating with skeleton loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PostTaskModal.ts: Modal form for creating a new task, handling title, category, price, location, deadline, Telegram handle, and photo upload with progress tracking via the useCreateTask hook.
frontend/src/components/QRCodeDisplay.ts: Generates and renders a UPI payment QR code using a CDN-loaded QRCode library, displaying the amount with a 10% platform fee added.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Renders a visual star rating component supporting full and half stars up to a configurable maximum.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Displays a task as a card with photo, category badge, location, deadline, and price; opens a details sheet for authenticated users or an auth prompt for unauthenticated ones.
frontend/src/components/TaskDetailsSheet: A slide-out sheet component that displays full task details and provides actions (accept, complete, delete, toggle Telegram chat) based on the current user's role (creator, performer, or visitor).
frontend/src/components/WeeklyProgressRe: A display component that shows a continuously auto-scrolling vertical reel of recently completed task examples to illustrate weekly activity.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Exports a single constant UPI_ID placeholder string used for payment processing configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: A hook that loads the Google Identity Services SDK, initializes Google Sign-In, and exposes signIn/signOut functions along with decoded user info from the JWT credential.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: A React Query hook that fetches the leaderboard list of user profiles from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfile.ts: A collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profile data (caller profile, stats, UserProfile) via the backend actor, including Google-based profile creation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskActions.ts: Exports React Query mutation hooks for task lifecycle actions: assigning a performer, completing, verifying, toggling Telegram discussion, and deleting a task.
frontend/src/hooks/useTasks.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, searching, and creating tasks via the backend actor, with authentication-aware query logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a dark-mode color theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/deepLinks.ts: Utility functions for building Telegram and UPI deep links, including a 10% platform fee calculation for UPI payments.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Utility functions for converting between bigint nanosecond timestamps and datetime-local input strings or human-readable formatted dates.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/src/views/HubView.tsx: Main hub page that displays a filterable, searchable task list with category selection, and handles post-task flow with authentication and profile guards.
frontend/src/views/LandingView.tsx: Landing page with hero content, Internet Identity login/signup flow, and navigation to the hub for authenticated users.
frontend/src/views/ProfileView.tsx: React view component that handles user profile onboarding (login, setup, dashboard) with Internet Identity and Google authentication, allowing users to create/update their profile and view post history and stats.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch), border radii, fonts, shadows, and keyframe animations for the frontend app.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (schema v1.0.0, version 11) that records existing implemented features and pending new feature requests with their requirement IDs and statuses.
